title: Glasgow Prestwick Airport to target India as it seeks to expand cargo operations

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport to target India as it seeks to expand cargo operations. Air cargo hub to target new Scotland to India full freighter services amid record demand for premium exports and recent tariff reduction...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Glasgow Prestwick Airport to target India as it seeks to expand cargo operations
